channel.title: Akhilesh Malani - Accessibility Blog
channel.description: Insights on digital accessibility from Akhilesh Malani — a blind accessibility architect with 16+ years of experience helping organisations build inclusive digital products.

item.title: How to Test Your Website with a Screen Reader — A Beginner's Guide
item.description: A practical, step-by-step guide to testing your website with screen readers like JAWS, NVDA, VoiceOver, and TalkBack — written by someone who uses them every day.
item.author: akhilesh.malani@gmail.com (Akhilesh Malani)

item.title: Your Automated Tools Miss 70% of What I Find
item.description: Automated accessibility tools catch only 30-40% of real issues. Here's what they miss and why manual testing by real users matters.
item.author: akhilesh.malani@gmail.com (Akhilesh Malani)

item.title: WCAG 2.2: What Changed and Why It Matters
item.description: WCAG 2.2 introduced 9 new success criteria. Here's what actually changed, what it means for your projects, and how to prepare.
item.author: akhilesh.malani@gmail.com (Akhilesh Malani)

item.title: Accessibility Is Not a Checklist — It's a Culture
item.description: Too many organisations treat accessibility as a compliance checkbox. Here's why that approach fails and what actually works.
item.author: akhilesh.malani@gmail.com (Akhilesh Malani)

item.title: India's SEBI Mandate: Are You Ready?
item.description: SEBI has mandated WCAG compliance for all regulated financial entities in India. Here's what you need to know and do.
item.author: akhilesh.malani@gmail.com (Akhilesh Malani)

item.title: What Happens When a Blind User Tries Your Banking App
item.description: I'm blind. I use banking apps every day. Here's what actually happens when I try to manage my money through your app.
item.author: akhilesh.malani@gmail.com (Akhilesh Malani)

item.title: RPwD Act 2016: What Every Indian Business Must Know About Digital Accessibility
item.description: India's Rights of Persons with Disabilities Act 2016 has real implications for digital accessibility. Here's what businesses need to know.
item.author: akhilesh.malani@gmail.com (Akhilesh Malani)

item.title: ARIA: The Tool Most Developers Use Wrong
item.description: ARIA is meant to improve accessibility, but developers often use it in ways that make things worse. Here's what you're getting wrong.
item.author: akhilesh.malani@gmail.com (Akhilesh Malani)

item.title: Why Indian Government Websites Fail Their Own Accessibility Guidelines
item.description: India has its own accessibility guidelines (GIGW 3.0), yet most government websites fail to meet them. Here's what I found.
item.author: akhilesh.malani@gmail.com (Akhilesh Malani)

item.title: You're Spending 30x More Than You Need To
item.description: Fixing accessibility in production costs 30x more than catching it in design. Here's how to shift left and save time, money, and frustration.
item.author: akhilesh.malani@gmail.com (Akhilesh Malani)
